blended.narrative: Nub's Nob is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 38 ft. Looking ahead, 44 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 20" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 15°F. Expect powder.
